array_of_message_objects_with_role_and_c: Array of message objects with role and content: [{ role: "system", content: "..." }, { role: "user", content: "..." }]
aws_access_key_id_for_bedrock: AWS Access Key ID for Bedrock
aws_secret_access_key_for_bedrock: AWS Secret Access Key for Bedrock
describe_what_you_want_to_create_or_chan: Describe what you want to create or change...
files_to_include_with_the_latest_user_me: Files to include with the latest user message
google_cloud_location_for_vertex_ai: Google Cloud location for Vertex AI
google_cloud_project_id_for_vertex_ai: Google Cloud project ID for Vertex AI
interaction_id_for_multi_turn_deep_resea: Interaction ID for multi-turn deep research follow-ups
maximum_number_of_tokens_for_token_based: Maximum number of tokens for token-based sliding window memory (when memoryType is sliding_window_tokens, e.g., "4000")
maximum_number_of_tokens_in_the_response: Maximum number of tokens in the response
must_be_object_for_a_valid_json_schema: Must be "object" for a valid JSON Schema
number_of_recent_messages_to_include_whe: Number of recent messages to include (when memoryType is sliding_window, e.g., "10")
reasoning_effort_level_for_gpt_5_models: Reasoning effort level for GPT-5 models
specific_conversation_id_to_retrieve_mem: Specific conversation ID to retrieve memories from (used when memoryType is conversation, sliding_window, or sliding_window_tokens)
the_agent_block_is_a_core_workflow_block: The Agent block is a core workflow block that is a wrapper around an LLM. It takes in system/user prompts and calls an LLM provider. It can also make tool calls by directly containing tools inside of its tool input. It can additionally return structured output.
thinking_level_for_models_with_extended_: Thinking level for models with extended thinking (Anthropic Claude, Gemini 3)
type_of_memory_to_use_none_conversation_: Type of memory to use: none, conversation, sliding_window, or sliding_window_tokens
whether_to_enforce_strict_schema_validat: Whether to enforce strict schema validation
